title: Hiring Store Manager at Pizza Hut India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Pizza Hut India
jsonLd.description:
Pizza Hut India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pizza Hut India:
Pizza Hut India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
